hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite nonexistent or fabricated papers with future 2025 dates and arXiv IDs that do not correspond to real publications (e.g., PiKE by Li et al. 2025, R&B by Ge et al. 2025, Shukor et al. 2025, Ostapenko et al. 2025). These cannot be verified and appear invented to support the related work section.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: '4. Ge, A., ... (2025). R&B: ... arXiv:2505.00358.', '7. Li, Z., ... (2025). PiKE: ... arXiv:2502.06244.', '11. Shukor, M., ... (2025). Scaling laws for optimal data mixtures. arXiv:2507.09404.' and similar entries for Nezhurina, Ostapenko, etc.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations were found, primarily nonexistent citations of fabricated 2025 papers. The experimental results and methodology appear consistent with the provided code implementation, with no clear evidence of faked results or mathematical errors in the reported metrics.
